outages.headline: GMS Week 29 – BLOCKADE RETURNS, TOLL RISES
outages.summary: The second act arrived with a name this time, and it was not “ceasefire.” Five consecutive days of American strikes through Wednesday hit Iranian positions from Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island to Sirik, while Washington reinstated the naval blockade of Iranian ports lifted during June’s interim peace. The blockade found its first target within a ...
